basics.name: Vincent Boutour
basics.label: Golang Developer
basics.summary: Naturally curious, I consider discovery and learning the essence of my daily work. I'm fond of challenges and I'm not afraid to fail. I'm autonomous, versatile, good teammate and pragmatic. Pedagogue, I taught algorithms and software engineering at IUT Paris Descartes, where I completed my studies. I have many computer skills acquired during my studies or work. The majority of these skills have been tested and implemented in a professional environment. Performance is an obsession, industrialization a passion. Sport holds a special place in my schedule. Horse riding when I was younger, rowing, skiing and daily cycling for commuting.

work.summary:
Backend engineer in Golang for the AWS Integrations team. Contributed to the Resource Collection of many AWS services while handling scalability constraints. Improved log forwarding reliability and efficiency.

As a member of the Cloud Integrations Platform, handling scalability and reliability for common cloud integration teams' needs regarding resources, metrics and tags collection.

Teaching assistant for courses Introduction to Algorithms and Programming (IAP), Data Structure and Algorithms (SDA) and Software Engineering Methods. Courses taught in 1st year degree and Licence Miage.

Part of the Molotov Solutions team, developing and improving the backend of the over-the-top platform for B2B clients by ensuring performance and scalability, internationalization, multiple payment providers and compatibility with B2C customers. On Fubo, creating a subscription system from scratch, on multiple continents, relying on multiple third-party payment providers.

work.position: Senior Software Engineer in Engineering Productivity
work.summary: Migration of Nexus artifacts and BitBucket repositories to GitHub. Migration of the GitOps workflow from Flux to Flux2. Improvement of various internal tools in Golang (CLI and clustered services). Support for all SaaS tools and documentation related to development. Improved continuous integration with observability, enrichment of pull-requests and parallelization. Working in a multi-cloud environment.

work.position: Front End Developer & Team Manager then Productivity Engineer
work.summary:
Front-end development. Redesign of Prices Pages with strong SEO consideration, implementation and feasibility analysis of PDF Report generation for realtors. Migrating real estate estimate form from HTML/PHP to React-Redux-Saga architecture with better modularity. Launching a brand-new product for realtors allowing to browse past sales. Releasing and contributing to our open source React Mapbox wrapper. Spreading of knowledge sharing between tech teams and functional testing culture.

Improving productivity of engineering teams by writing and adding new tools, spreading new code conventions and devops philosophy in a growing team, speeding up continuous integration, onboarding new members. Training developers to Docker & Kubernetes ecosystem and actively migrating apps from classic instances to this new infrastructure. Creating several Slack integrations, notably an "ops" bot which pushes continuous integration status to developers.

Development of a work planning application on RATP metro, RER and tram networks. Displaying generated SVG from Neo4j graph database data in ReactJS. Back-end in Java Play. Development of an email template Rich Text Editor with DraftJS and Mustache.

Development and maintenance of an internal CRM tool at Exane BNP Paribas. Improved stability of the CTI application for traders on financial markets and derivatives. Development of a full-text search tool in Javascript.

Maintenance and development of the Chassagne repository at Générix Group. Context of EDI between trading partners. Implementation of Rancher to allow the QA team to deploy environments at their convenience.

Implementation of a software factory entirely under Docker with continuous deployment.

Maintenance and development of Omnikles products (dematerialization) and CertEurope (digital certificate), two companies in Oodrive's group. Improving Oodrive's main product: Easyshare. Handling websockets communication in a clustered environment and improving API for mobile apps. Developing tools for the Q&A team in NodeJS.

Installation of Recital and 'Dictionnaire de Données' products for various clients. Adaptation to the characteristics of each environment for the development of the middleware between the frontend, in HTML & Java, and Cobol business backend. Performance management and maintainability on a transactional environment.

Performance audit of a Java application and application patch during the implementation phase. Reliability and routing control of a customer migration at BNP Paribas. Volume management. Cross-functional perspective and technological choices (Office, Java and Mainframe) to meet the need.

Modeling, analysis and U.M.L. designing of a staff management application at BNP Paribas. Design for both a Java w/ Oracle and Cobol w/ DB2 targets.

Working on an electronic banking litigation management application in Partecis, on PACBASE mainframe environment and international electronic banking compensations, VISA and MasterCard.
